rule.desc: Optimizing without evidence of a bottleneck.
rule.why_bad: Adds complexity and hides real issues.

rule.desc: Using streams with side effects or shared mutable state.
rule.better: Keep stream operations pure or use a loop.
rule.why_bad: Hard to reason about and unsafe for parallel streams.

rule.desc: Using `List.contains` in hot paths with large lists.
Compiling regex patterns repeatedly in loops.
